title: Accessibility
description: Accessibility The U.S. Department of Energy is committed to making its information and communications technology (ICT) accessible to individuals with disabilities in accordance with Section 508 of the Rehabilitation Act (29 U.S.C. 794d). Send feedback or concerns related to the accessibility of this website to DOE Section 508 Coordinator mailbox.
text:
The U.S. Department of Energy is committed to making its information and communications technology (ICT) accessible to individuals with disabilities in accordance with Section 508 of the Rehabilitation Act (29 U.S.C. 794d).
Send feedback or concerns related to the accessibility of this website to DOE Section 508 Coordinator mailbox.
